channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke was minutes away from completing a perfect record on its famed home court with a Senior Night rout of Wake Forest. That's when the buzzer sounded for freshman phenom Cooper Flagg, who checked out — possibly for the final time at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander making 50-point games a regular occurrence for the West-leading Thunder
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander’s putback basket in the fourth quarter put him over 50 points and sent the Oklahoma City crowd into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: Cliff Brunt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cryer scores 22 points and No. 3 Houston beats Kansas 65-59 for 9th straight win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 22 points and No. 3 Houston won its ninth straight game with a 65-59 victory over Kansas on Monday night. Emanuel Sharp added 12 points off the bench, including two free throws that pushed Houston's lead to 63-59 with 20 seconds left.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: KKyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain and shot free throws for the Mavericks before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Senate Dems face backlash after bill to prevent boys from playing girls' sports fails to break filibuster
item.description: Riley Gaines, Jennifer Sey and others torch Senate Democrats after the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act fails to break the filibuster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cooper Flagg, No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 to claim at least share of ACC regular-season crown
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman Cooper Flagg had 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in possibly his final home game, helping No. 2 Duke beat Wake Forest 93-60 on Monday night to clinch at least a share of the Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being a face of its NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: CIF NorCal Open champ Archbishop Mitty hires former Marin Catholic volleyball coach Jake Spain to run program
item.description: Archbishop Mitty's new volleyball coach, Jake Spain, has extensive experience at the high school and club level in the North Bay. He'll have a tall task ahead replacing outgoing coach Jon Wallace.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Legge to become 1st woman since Danica Patrick to compete in Cup Series race. Will race at Phoenix
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Katherine Legge will become the first woman in a NASCAR Cup Series race since Danica Patrick in 2018 when the veteran makes her debut Sunday at Phoenix Raceway. Legge will drive the No. 78 Chevrolet for Live Fast Motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LA Kings apologize for selling scarves made in Turkey on Armenian Night
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Kings have apologized for selling scarves made in Turkey during Armenian Heritage Night last month.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals announce Tee Higgins has been franchise tagged for 2nd season in a row
item.description: The Cincinnati Bengals are franchise tagging wide receiver Tee Higgins for the second straight season, announcing the move on Monday with their intent to reach a long-term extension.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles set to release Super Bowl champion cornerback Darius Slay, AP source says
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Philadelphia Eagles are set to release six-time Pro Bowl cornerback Darius Slay, a person familiar with the decision said Monday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the team has not yet announced the decision.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Serena Williams joins ownership group of Toronto Tempo, the WNBA's 1st Canadian franchise
item.description: Serena Williams is joining the ownership group of the WNBA’s first Canadian franchise, the Toronto Tempo, the team announced Monday. She will partner with Larry Tanenbaum, Chairman of Kilmer Sports Ventures for the Tempo, who will begin play in the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Devils' Jack Hughes suffers gruesome shoulder injury after after crashing into boards
item.description: New Jersey Devils star center Jack Hughes suffered a gruesome right shoulder injury in Sunday night's loss to the Vegas Golden Knights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL shuts out Seattle in MLS home opener, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Having scored just one goal in its first three games of the 2025 campaign, Real Salt Lake got some help from the Seattle Sounders on its way to a 2-0 victory in its MLS home opener Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU gets smacked by Colorado State, 93-66
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - This is not the way the Utah State basketball team was hoping to go into the postseason. The Aggies suffered its worst loss of the season, losing by 27 points to Colorado State Saturday afternoon, 93-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Angelo Posada, The Titan of the Titans
item.description: "Those who stay will be champions" - that's the motto of Poway Wrestling; one they adopted from Michigan Football under that was adopted under legendary head Coach Bo Schembechler. That motto rings true for the five-time state champion Titans, who have won 44 CIF SDS titles in the last 47 years.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bountiful 3-peats with another 5A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful girls basketball team has built a true dynasty. The Redhawks knocked off previously undefeated West High to win its third straight state championship Friday night at the Huntsman Center, 57-47.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
